system:
You are the Stage-1 Intake & Classification agent for Keysight SalesOps. Read one customer email and emit ONE strict JSON object. Output goes directly to json.loads() and enum validators.

OUTPUT CONTRACT — emit exactly these 10 keys:
{
  "language": "<"en", "es", "ja", "other">",
  "language_reasoning": "<string>",
  "intent": "<"po_intake", "quote_to_order", "trade_change_order", "ssd_change_request", "hold_release", "delivery_change", "service_order", "wo_update_request", "wo_status_inquiry", "service_contract_request", "general_inquiry", "spam">",
  "intent_confidence": <number 0.0-1.0>,
  "intent_reasoning": "<1-2 sentences citing exact words from the email>",
  "secondary_intents": [],
  "spam": <true|false>,
  "spam_reason": "<string; "" if not spam>",
  "summary": "<one English sentence>",
  "track_hint": "<trade|som|service_contract|none>"
}

FIELD RULES (positive form):
  • "intent" is a single string from the canonical list (never an array, never inside another object).
  • "intent_confidence" is a top-level number (never inside an "intents" object).
  • "track_hint" is the workflow track — one of: trade, som, service_contract, none. NOT an autonomy tier (no "L4_auto", "L3", "auto").
  • "intent_reasoning" is a sentence quoting words from the email (the field name is "intent_reasoning", not "notes" or "rationale").
  • Emit all 10 keys every time. Use "" or [] for empty values.

INTENT MAPPING (track in parens):
  "po_intake" (track=trade) — new purchase order received from a customer (no prior quote referenced)
  "quote_to_order" (track=trade) — customer asking to convert an existing quote into a sales order
  "trade_change_order" (track=trade) — customer requesting changes to an EXISTING booked sales order (qty, line items, billing) — NOT just a ship-date change
  "ssd_change_request" (track=trade) — customer requesting a Ship Schedule Date (SSD) change on an existing order — push out, pull in, or partial
  "hold_release" (track=trade) — customer asking to release an order from a hold (credit, export, payment)
  "delivery_change" (track=trade) — customer requesting a one-time delivery rescheduling (use ssd_change_request when they say 'ship schedule date' explicitly)
  "service_order" (track=som) — new request to create a work order — calibration, repair, installation, on-site service, possibly multi-asset
  "wo_update_request" (track=som) — customer asking to update or modify an EXISTING work order (add notes, add tasks, update assets)
  "wo_status_inquiry" (track=som) — customer asking about the status of an existing work order or open WOs
  "service_contract_request" (track=service_contract) — customer asking for a service contract / support agreement quote or order (cal plan, onsite plan, PM plan)
  "general_inquiry" (track=none) — other legitimate business question (EOL roadmap, product info, lead-time questions, etc.)
  "spam" (track=none) — unsolicited / phishing / off-topic / promotional
  Trade = orders/PO/quote conversion/holds/ship-date changes. SOM = work-orders/calibration/repair/install. service_contract = cal plan/PM plan/support agreement. none = general inquiry, spam.

WORKED EXAMPLES (reproduce this exact shape):

Example 1 — fresh PO (po_intake / trade)
  IN  Subject "PO PO-X-1 — DSO purchase, please ack" / Body "PO-X-1 attached for one DSO. Net 45."
  OUT {"language":"en","language_reasoning":"All-English.","intent":"po_intake","intent_confidence":0.95,"intent_reasoning":"Subject and body explicitly attach PO PO-X-1; no quote referenced.","secondary_intents":[],"spam":false,"spam_reason":"","summary":"New PO PO-X-1 needing acknowledgment.","track_hint":"trade"}

Example 2 — quote-to-order (quote_to_order / trade)
  IN  Subject "Convert quote QT-A-1 → order — PO attached" / Body "Please convert QT-A-1 into an order using PO-A-1. Send SOA."
  OUT {"language":"en","language_reasoning":"All-English.","intent":"quote_to_order","intent_confidence":0.97,"intent_reasoning":"Body says 'convert QT-A-1 into an order' with PO attached.","secondary_intents":[],"spam":false,"spam_reason":"","summary":"Convert quote QT-A-1 to a sales order.","track_hint":"trade"}

Example 3 — service order (service_order / som)
  IN  Subject "Multi-asset cal request" / Body "Please open a work order to calibrate 6 instruments on-site, ISO 17025 traceable."
  OUT {"language":"en","language_reasoning":"All-English.","intent":"service_order","intent_confidence":0.96,"intent_reasoning":"Body says 'Please open a work order to calibrate' — new on-site cal request.","secondary_intents":[],"spam":false,"spam_reason":"","summary":"On-site calibration work order for 6 instruments.","track_hint":"som"}

Example 4 — promotional spam (spam / none)
  IN  Subject "🎉 70% OFF — TODAY ONLY" / Body "Click now to save big!"
  OUT {"language":"en","language_reasoning":"All-English.","intent":"spam","intent_confidence":0.99,"intent_reasoning":"Promotional emoji and urgency 'TODAY ONLY'; no order content.","secondary_intents":[],"spam":true,"spam_reason":"Promotional discount blast.","summary":"Promotional discount blast.","track_hint":"none"}

Now read the email below and emit one JSON object matching the contract exactly. No prose, no code fences, no additional keys.
user:
FROM: Google <no-reply@accounts.google.com>
SUBJECT: Security alert
LANGUAGE_HINT: en
BODY:
[image: Google]
App password created to sign in to your account


orderinbox@leewayhertz.com
If you didn't generate this password for Application, someone might be
using your account. Check and secure your account now.
Check activity
<https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=orderinbox@leewayhertz.com&continue=https://myaccount.google.com/alert/nt/1778148650334?rfn%3D20%26rfnc%3D1%26eid%3D-4643087032193397348%26et%3D0>
You can also see security activity at
https://myaccount.google.com/notifications
You received this email to let you know about important changes to your
Google Account and services.
© 2026 Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA

Classify per the contract. Output one JSON object only.

language.description: ISO 639-1 code from the canonical list

language_reasoning.description: 1 sentence explaining the language cue (script, vocabulary, idiom)

intent.description: Single canonical intent value — never an array, never invented

intent_reasoning.description: 1–2 sentences citing exact words from the email subject or body

secondary_intents.description: Other plausible intents beyond the primary; empty array if none

spam.description: True iff the email is spam/phishing/promotional

spam_reason.description: Why it's spam; empty string if not spam

summary.description: One English sentence summarizing the primary request

track_hint.description: Workflow track: trade=orders/PO/holds; som=work-orders/cal/repair; service_contract=cal-plan/PM-plan; none=general/spam

raw_response: {"language":"en","language_reasoning":"The email content is entirely in English (e.g., 'Security alert' and 'Check and secure your account now').","intent":"spam","intent_confidence":0.99,"intent_reasoning":"It is a 'Security alert' from 'no-reply@accounts.google.com' stating 'App password created' and 'Check and secure your account now' with an account link, not a Keysight order/service request.","secondary_intents":[],"spam":true,"spam_reason":"Account security notification/phishing-like message unrelated to Keysight SalesOps workflows (no PO/quote/order/work order content).","summary":"Google account security alert about an app password creation with a link to check activity.","track_hint":"none"}

parsed.language_reasoning: The email content is entirely in English (e.g., 'Security alert' and 'Check and secure your account now').
parsed.intent_reasoning: It is a 'Security alert' from 'no-reply@accounts.google.com' stating 'App password created' and 'Check and secure your account now' with an account link, not a Keysight order/service request.
parsed.spam_reason: Account security notification/phishing-like message unrelated to Keysight SalesOps workflows (no PO/quote/order/work order content).
parsed.summary: Google account security alert about an app password creation with a link to check activity.
